name: Magic Marker
description:
You have found a strange magic marker. It really looks magical. In fact, any word written on the skin of someone will make that person change, physically or psychologically, to reflect the words. Are you going to test it on yourself? On someone else?

This bot is based on the story "Magic Marker" by AnonyMPC on ASSTR.

Question:

This is my second most popular bot. It amazes me because I have never played much with it, at least not for more than a few messages. Yet the stats show that players have long (>20 messages) roleplay with it. Please tell me in the comments how you roleplay with this bot.

My other bots

If you enjoyed this bot, you might in particular also like those:

  • Ditzy Dice Life
